item.title: Showtime Website History
item.description: For now, this is a gitinfo tryout: (see https://gohugo.io/methods/page/gitinfo/) GitInfo: Gitinfo: AbbreviatedHash: 33562df AuthorDate: 2026-07-20 AuthorEmail: 101331929+TimLeonSteiner@users.noreply.github.com AuthorName: Tim Steiner CommitDate: 2026-07-20 Hash: 33562df5f5e2620e09823529b042fd34d5538474 Subject: B2 add project page (#517)
